title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at VRL Logistics

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at VRL Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Join the VRL Logistics family as a Fleet Manager in Allahabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About VRL Logistics:
VRL Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VRL Logistics!
jsonLd.skills: Freight Forwarding, TMS, Route Optimization, Vendor Management, GPS Tracking Systems, Reverse Logistics, INCOTERMS, WMS
